mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is flat or falling, the discount-rate channel dominates and supports higher equity prices over the next 20 trading days. The signal is confirmed if short-rate cuts coincide with positive S&P 500 forward returns and rejected if rate declines do not improve 20-day returns.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX forward returns are not positive in at least 55% of months with a 3-month decline in FEDFUNDS, or if the rolling 2-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL inflation acceleration above its recent trend raises expected policy tightening and lowers equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The effect is strongest when inflation surprises are broad rather than temporary.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show negative 20-day SPX returns at least 60% of the time, or if inflation accelerations fail to coincide with weaker returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE with simultaneous slowing PAYEMS signals labor-market deterioration and weaker household income growth, which depresses near-term equity returns. The mechanism is falsified if labor weakness does not precede lower 20-day SPX returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns are positive in more than 45% of labor-deterioration episodes, or if the signal's rolling 2-year hit rate falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized rise in RSAFS and HOUST captures strengthening household demand and housing turnover, which supports cyclical earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal fails when sales rise without housing support or vice versa.
failure_condition: Reject if joint-strength episodes in RSAFS and HOUST do not produce positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases, or if either series alone explains the return pattern better than the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO signals weakening industrial activity and softer earnings momentum, which should be followed by negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The relationship is strongest when industrial weakness is persistent rather than one-month noise.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered cases fail to underperform over 60-day horizons, or if the median forward return after two-month industrial declines is not below zero across a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDPC1 growth together with rising RSAFS indicates durable final demand and improves earnings expectations, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The mechanism is falsified if real activity and sales growth do not translate into equity strength.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized quarterly growth exceeds its prior 4-quarter average
failure_condition: Reject if high-growth GDP and sales periods do not deliver positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 60% of instances, or if the joint signal loses significance after controlling for either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp PAYEMS slowdown paired with a rising UNRATE marks an incipient recessionary labor shock that compresses risk appetite and lowers S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days. The signal should be immediate rather than delayed.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average growth falls below zero while UNRATE rises
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show negative 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the sign reverses after labor deterioration becomes visible.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-tightening regime, a stable or declining FEDFUNDS rate combined with contained CPIAUCSL inflation supports multiple expansion and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The mechanism fails if lower policy rates occur alongside accelerating inflation that forces renewed tightening expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if periods of flat or falling FEDFUNDS with non-accelerating CPIAUCSL do not outperform baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if inflation upswings erase the positive effect.
